## Description
Provide a concise summary of the changes proposed in this Pull Request and their motivation.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactoring (code cleanup/restructuring with no behavior changes)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

### Security
- [ ] No secrets or keys are hardcoded (verified environment variables are used).
- [ ] Access control / role-based authorization has been verified for new endpoints.
- [ ] Inputs are sanitized/validated to prevent NoSQL/XSS injections.

### Quality & Testing
- [ ] Unit tests have been added or updated for new logic (e.g. `npm test` runs and passes).
- [ ] Local manual testing has been conducted to verify the changes.
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines and maintains docstring integrity.

### Documentation & Tracking
- [ ] Relevant documentation (like `PRD.md`, `README.md`, or JSDocs) has been updated.
- [ ] Issues/tasks resolved are linked to this PR.
